title: Growth Gateway: Solar irrigation investment case
body: "This slide deck was prepared by the Growth Gateway programme team in collaboration with the Boston Consulting Group. It aims to support stakeholders to understand Africa’s solar irrigation market, which is projected to increase from £24 million to £64 million by 2027.  The document:   analyses the solar irrigation market in Africa outlines the growth drivers and market dynamics identifies success factors and operational models for project viability suggests strategic pathways for UK investors to engage with the sector   The document is both an investment case and a practical guide to navigating barriers such as financing, regulation, and demand risk in solar irrigation across the continent.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
